name: shared-evaluators
_comment: Suite-agnostic quality and safety evaluators applied to every agent turn. Only 'query' is required per row; add ground-truth fields (any key other than 'query') to feed evaluators that compare against expected output. Replace these placeholder literature-research queries with prompts representative of your own agent.

data.query: Summarize the leading approaches to solid-state battery electrolytes and their trade-offs.
What does recent literature say about the mechanical properties of graphene composites?
Find and summarize studies comparing perovskite and silicon solar cell efficiency.
Explain the current consensus on catalytic pathways for green hydrogen production.
Identify open research questions in room-temperature superconductivity.
